title: dombeya subsquamosa
intro: Dombeya subsquamosa, also known as the African Wild Pear or Nkanga, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dombeya subsquamosa include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
